info.name: VaultFit API Full Collection
info.description: Complete API tests for all currently implemented VaultFit backend routes.

exec: pm.test('Body has status ok', function () { pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('ok'); });
// If already exists, fetch via list call
pm.test('Trainer ID available for next requests', function () { pm.expect(pm.collectionVariables.get('trainerProfileId')).to.not.eql(''); });
pm.test('List blocked dates status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Delete blocked date status 204 or 400', function () { pm.expect([204,400]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('Booking moved to confirmed', function () { pm.expect(booking && booking.status).to.eql('confirmed'); });
pm.test('Mark booking completed status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Review ID available for delete', function () { pm.expect(pm.collectionVariables.get('reviewId')).to.not.eql(''); });
pm.test('Mark messages read status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Mark notification read status 200 or 400', function () { pm.expect([200,400]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('Mark all notifications read status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('List admin verification requests status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Review verification request status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Trainer view verification request status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('List admin users status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
